case_title: HARVEY,ANNE T. VS BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY HARVEY,ANNE T. AS TO DEFENDANT BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF JAN-05-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO BRIAN DONNELLY RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARVEY,ANNE T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLUE CROSS OF CALIFORNIA $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGE SING ORDERED TO HOLD MAILING OF JUDGMENT UNTIL 02-01-94.
LETTER TO ANNE HARVEY FROM BLUE CROSS ON FILE.
